name: Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (180°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, oats, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
3. Add egg whites, corn syrup, and vanilla to the dry ingredients. Stir until all ingredients are moistened. The dough will be thick.
4. Lightly spray a baking sheet with non-stick cooking spray or grease it lightly with butter or oil.
5. Drop heaping teaspoonfuls of dough onto the prepared baking sheet.
6. Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until the cookies are set but still slightly soft in the center.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool on the baking sheet for about 5 minutes, allowing them to firm up.
8. Transfer the cooled cookies to a wire rack to finish cooling.
Makes about 2 1/2 dozen cookies (depending on size).
